opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These red circles are spreading all over his legs, and he is scratching them so hard they are bleeding. He won't stop crying from the itch.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Spreading itchy red circles on my child's legs, scratched until bleeding.

symptom_narrative.onset: small scaly patch on the thigh 10 days ago, spreading over 5 days
symptom_narrative.character: red circles with a scaly raised edge and clearer centres; intensely itchy; scratched raw
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: intense itch, crying, not sleeping; scratches bleeding
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: raised scaly edges, clearer centres; raw weeping/bleeding scratches on the edges; no fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: plays heavily in soil and grass; dirt under the nails

objective_data_offered.value: several 4-8cm red circles on both thighs/calves with a raised scaly outer edge and clearer centres; the edges are scratched raw, weeping and bleeding a little; no hot hard swelling
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent/camera; cannot palpate for deeper infection
